Table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

Card of table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

Name

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

Code

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGES

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_ACTIVE AS BADGE_ACTIVE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_CODE AS BADGE_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_DESCRIPTION_EN AS BADGE_DESCRIPTION,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_NAME_EN AS BADGE_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_OFFLINEDATE AS BADGE_OFFLINE_DATETIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_ONLINEDATE AS BADGE_ONLINE_DATETIME,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGES

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_CODE

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, BADGE_CODE_BK,

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

CKT_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

drop table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE (
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
BADGE_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
BADGE_ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG,
BADGE_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
BADGE_NAME TEXT,
BADGE_OFFLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
BADGE_ONLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_ primary key (COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, BADGE_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing product-level badges, such as promotional or marketing status icons, including badge codes, descriptions, validity periods, and activation flags to drive product merchandising and display.';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.BADGE_CODE_BK is
'Badge Code (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.BADGE_ACTIVE_FLAG is
'Badge Active (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_active )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.BADGE_DESCRIPTION is
'Badge Description (EN) (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_description_en )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.BADGE_NAME is
'Badge Name (EN) (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_name_en )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.BADGE_OFFLINE_DATETIME is
'Badge Offline Date (events_products_productAvailableBadges_offlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.BADGE_ONLINE_DATETIME is
'Badge Online Date (events_products_productAvailableBadges_onlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABLE_BADGE

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
